pageContext.name: Aggressor Brother Sergeant Lycias
pageContext.description: Sideshow and JoyToy are proud to present the Aggressor Brother Sergeant Lycias Action Figure, as part of the Imperial Fists series from the line of Warhammer 40K action figures!  The Imperial Fists are among the First Founding Chapters of the Space Marines and stand out among other Space Marines as they have no fixed homeworld. Instead, they rely upon their ancient mobile space fortress named Phalanx which serves as both fortress and monastery.  Aggressors are specialists within the Primaris Space Marines, and are tasked with close-range fire support. A Brother, or Battle-Brother, is the most common unit for a Space Marine to be assigned to after passing their trials, as well as being a general form of address Space Marines will use when addressing one another.
